task: Implement Homepage SAA 2025: sticky header with hamburger nav, hero section with countdown, root-further section, awards grid from Supabase DB, kudos promo, footer, widget button FAB, auth guard on / route, i18n keys for vi/en
acceptanceCriteria: Header renders on desktop: logo + 3 nav links + bell + lang switcher + user avatar
Header mobile: hamburger icon opens drawer with nav links
Footer renders: logo, 4 nav links, copyright text
Widget button renders as yellow pill fixed bottom-right
Hero section renders with ROOT FURTHER heading, countdown timer, event info, 2 CTA buttons
Root Further section renders with decorative background text and quote
Awards section fetches 6 awards from Supabase and renders 3-col grid on desktop
Award card links to /awards#slug with correct slug per category
Kudos section renders with 2-col layout on desktop
Unauthenticated user accessing / is redirected to /login
Authenticated user accessing / sees the full homepage
All text goes through i18n keys in vi.json and en.json
npm run build passes with 0 errors
npm run test passes with all tests green
npm run lint passes with 0 errors
blastRadius: middleware.ts: changes affect all routes — /login redirect logic preserved, / auth guard added
messages/*.json: adding keys only — no existing keys modified
contracts: CountdownTimer(targetDate: string) — reused from countdown page, no changes

awards table: id, category, title, description, year columns
